questions.subject: pharmacology
questions.question: Antibiotics question 1: Which statement is most appropriate about antibacterial therapy?
options: Therapy should consider likely organism and local resistance patterns
All antibiotics are interchangeable regardless of indication
Broad-spectrum treatment is always preferred for every patient
Monitoring is unnecessary once the drug is started
questions.correctAnswer: Therapy should consider likely organism and local resistance patterns
questions.explanation: Antibiotic choice should be guided by the likely pathogen, infection site, patient factors, and resistance data. Unnecessary broad-spectrum therapy increases resistance and adverse effects.
